rationale: Materials Science at L3 lands where applications meet material classes. Battery materials, perovskite solar, MOFs/COFs, 2D heterostructures, biomaterial scaffolds — each has a dedicated journal section and a recognizable community. I gave Materials by Design two leaves (high-throughput experimental + ML/generative) because the autonomous-lab community has crystallized as distinct from pure ML4Materials.

subfields.name: High-Entropy & Complex Alloys
subfields.tagline: HEAs, MPEAs, complex alloy design, novel phases.

subfields.name: Additive Manufacturing of Metals
subfields.tagline: Powder-bed fusion, DED, AM microstructure, process-property.

subfields.name: Lightweight Structural Metals
subfields.tagline: Al, Mg, Ti alloys, lightweighting, marine-grade steels.

subfields.name: Advanced & Functional Ceramics
subfields.tagline: Piezoelectric, dielectric, MAX/MXene, ultra-high-temperature ceramics.

subfields.name: Functional & Stimuli-Responsive Polymers
subfields.tagline: Shape-memory polymers, self-healing, stimuli-responsive polymers, conducting polymers.

subfields.name: Hydrogels & Soft Actuators
subfields.tagline: Hydrogel synthesis-applied, ionogels, soft actuators, soft robotics materials.

subfields.name: Polymer Composites & Nanocomposites
subfields.tagline: Polymer-matrix composites with nano/graphene/CNT fillers.

subfields.name: Fiber-Reinforced Composites
subfields.tagline: CFRPs, GFRPs, hybrid laminates, automated manufacturing.

subfields.name: Multifunctional & Smart Composites
subfields.tagline: Energy-storage composites, sensing composites, self-healing composites.

subfields.name: Thin-Film Deposition & Growth
subfields.tagline: ALD, CVD, MBE, PLD, in-situ film growth control.

subfields.name: Nanoparticle Synthesis & Assembly
subfields.tagline: Colloidal nanoparticles, plasmonic, quantum dots, nanocluster assembly.

subfields.name: Nanowires & Nanotubes
subfields.tagline: Semiconductor nanowires, carbon nanotubes (materials angle), nano-electronic devices.

subfields.name: Graphene & TMDC 2D Materials (Synthesis)
subfields.tagline: Graphene growth, TMDC synthesis, 2D material processing.

subfields.name: 2D Heterostructures & Devices
subfields.tagline: Vertical/lateral heterostructures, 2D-based devices, integration.

subfields.name: Battery Cathodes, Anodes & Electrolytes
subfields.tagline: Li-ion + next-gen cathodes (NMC, LFP, Na-ion, solid-state).

subfields.name: Perovskite & Next-Gen Photovoltaics
subfields.tagline: Perovskite solar cells, tandems, stability research.

subfields.name: Thermoelectrics & Thermal Management Materials
subfields.tagline: Thermoelectric materials, radiative cooling, thermal management.

subfields.name: Hydrogen Storage & Solid-State Fuel Materials
subfields.tagline: Hydrogen storage materials, fuel cell membranes, solid-oxide materials.

subfields.name: Scaffolds & Bioactive Biomaterials
subfields.tagline: Scaffolds for bone/cartilage/skin, bioactive coatings, calcium phosphates.

subfields.name: Drug Delivery Materials
subfields.tagline: Nanocarriers, LNPs as materials, polymeric micelles, hydrogels for delivery.

subfields.name: Implant & Tissue-Interface Materials
subfields.tagline: Bone implant materials, neural interfaces (materials), dental materials.

subfields.name: Spintronic & Magnetic Thin-Film Materials
subfields.tagline: MRAM stacks, spin-orbit torque materials, antiferromagnetic spintronics materials.

subfields.name: Ferroelectric & Piezoelectric Materials
subfields.tagline: HfO2-based ferroelectrics, multiferroics, lead-free piezoelectrics.

subfields.name: Semiconductor Materials (Wide & Ultrawide Bandgap)
subfields.tagline: GaN, SiC, Ga2O3, AlN — bulk materials and substrates.

subfields.name: Fracture, Fatigue & Damage Mechanics
subfields.tagline: Crack growth, fatigue life, damage models, multi-scale mechanics.

subfields.name: Mechanical Metamaterials & Architected Materials
subfields.tagline: Lattice structures, auxetic materials, lightweight architected solids.

subfields.name: In-Situ & Multi-Scale Mechanical Testing
subfields.tagline: Nanomechanical testing, in-situ SEM/TEM mechanics, micropillar.

subfields.name: High-Throughput Experiments & Autonomous Labs
subfields.tagline: Self-driving labs, combinatorial synthesis, robotic chemistry for materials.

subfields.name: ML & Generative Models for Materials
subfields.tagline: Diffusion/generative models, GNN potentials, materials property prediction.

subfields.name: DFT & First-Principles for Materials
subfields.tagline: DFT property calculation, defect chemistry, phonon and ab initio MD for materials.

subfields.name: Electron Microscopy (TEM/STEM)
subfields.tagline: Aberration-corrected STEM, 4D-STEM, in-situ TEM, electron tomography.

subfields.name: X-Ray & Synchrotron Characterization
subfields.tagline: Synchrotron XRD, XPS, X-ray absorption methods for materials.

subfields.name: Atom Probe & 3D Atomic Characterization
subfields.tagline: Atom probe tomography, 3D atomic-scale characterization, correlative microscopy.

uncovered_concerns: Ceramics & Glasses L2 only has one big L3 leaf because most ceramics papers cluster around 'functional ceramics' — splitting structural ceramics would shrink the slot too small.
Glasses specifically (oxide/metallic glasses) folds under Advanced & Functional Ceramics here; can split in v2.
